title: Sync device name to PC dashboard

detail: raw Thai text in HTTP header rejected/would be mangled by strict clients (RFC 7230 header values must be ASCII)
fixed via percent-encoding (URLEncoder + %2B->%20 fix), curl round-trip with real Thai device name confirmed decode-correct via /api/config

title: Real server-side auth for dashboard API
detail: found existing PIN gate was client-side-only cosmetic UI, zero server enforcement on 17 API/SSE calls
curl matrix: no-token 401, wrong-bearer 401, correct-bearer 200, correct-query-token 200 (SSE/img-src path), dashboard shell loads unauthed 200, /ingest unchanged 401, TOKEN-unset no-op 200 confirmed
